def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    # strip tashkeel
    tashkeel = ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x0610, 0x061A+1)) + ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x064B, 0x065F+1)) + '\u0670' + '\u06D6' + '\u06ED'
    s = re.sub('[' + re.escape(tashkeel) + ']', '', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('\u0640', '')
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces and lowercase
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip().lower()
    return s

target_tokens

def token_f1_standard(target, cand):
    t = normalize_arabic(target).split()
    c = normalize_arabic(cand).split()
    t_counts = collections.Counter(t)
    c_counts = collections.Counter(c)
    overlap = sum(min(t_counts[w], c_counts[w]) for w in set(t_counts))
    precision = overlap/len(c) if c else 0
    recall = overlap/len(t) if t else 0
    return (2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)) if (precision+recall)>0 else 0

target = "إِنَّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ كَانَ يَتَحَمَّلُ الْعَذَابَ لِعِبَادَتهِ"
best = []
for h in hadiths:
    text = (h.get('hadithTxt') or '') + ' ' + (h.get('Matn') or '')
    score = token_f1_standard(target, text)
    if score > 0.1:
        best.append((score, h['hadithID'], text[:200].replace('\n',' ')))
sorted(best, reverse=True)[:10]

# Collect hadiths that contain 'ابراهيم' in normalized text (Ibrahim appears a lot because many narrators named Ibrahim)
# We must restrict to those where 'ابراهيم' refers to Prophet, but we'll accept all.
cands = []
for h in hadiths:
    text = (h.get('hadithTxt') or '') + ' ' + (h.get('Matn') or '')
    ntext = normalize_arabic(text)
    if 'ابراهيم' in ntext:
        cands.append((h['hadithID'], text, ntext))
len(cands)

target_norm = normalize_arabic("إِنَّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ كَانَ يَتَحَمَّلُ الْعَذَابَ لِعِبَادَتهِ")
ratios = []
for hid, text, ntext in cands:
    r = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, target_norm, ntext).ratio()
    if r > 0.6:
        ratios.append((r, hid, text[:200].replace('\n',' ')))
sorted(ratios, reverse=True)[:10], len(ratios)
